expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
expectations.evidence: No session ID generation or state directory. Baseline starts directly with codebase discovery.
No agent spawning. Single agent performs all analysis directly.

expectations.text: Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json의 dimensions.domain이 security 관련 값을 포함
expectations.evidence: No seed-analysis.json or structured dimension evaluation.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspective-generator가 seed-analysis.json의 security 관련 dimensions을 읽고 security archetype 매핑
expectations.evidence: No perspective generation. No archetype mapping.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: security perspective의 model이 opus, agent_type이 architect (archetype table 일치)
Phase 0.55: perspectives.json에 rules_applied 필드가 있고 core_archetype_included=true
expectations.evidence: No rules_applied field or mandatory rule system.

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestion으로 perspective 승인 요청 후 perspectives.json에 approved=true 추가
expectations.evidence: No user approval step for analysis perspectives.

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping 실행 (prism_docs_roots 호출 시도)
expectations.evidence: No ontology scope mapping. No prism_docs_roots usage.

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.json에 research_summary가 seed-analysis.json의 research 데이터를 반영
Phase 1: security-analyst가 extended-archetypes.md의 Security Lens 섹션 + finding-protocol.md로 spawn
expectations.evidence: No separate security analyst agent spawned. Analysis is done directly by the single baseline agent.

expectations.text: Phase 1: 각 analyst가 perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
expectations.evidence: No structured findings.json files. Findings embedded inline in response.

expectations.text: Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
expectations.evidence: No agent lifecycle management or task drain.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
expectations.evidence: No verification phase. No prism_interview MCP usage. Baseline lists manual verification steps as hypotheticals.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.md에 모든 perspective의 검증 결과 통합
Phase 3: report.md 템플릿의 모든 섹션이 analyst-findings.md 기반으로 채워짐
expectations.evidence: No template-based report. Output is ad-hoc with sections like 'Structure Followed', 'Tools Used Summary', 'What I Would Do Differently'. Missing Socratic Verification Summary, Prevention Checklist, Integrated Analysis.
